reviews.title: Size
reviews.reviewText: Very disappointed there were no reviews on the shorts so I just went with what size the model was wearing. Extremely misleading and now I’m stuck with nonreturnable item.

luluResponse.responseText:
Hi Peter, 

Thanks for taking the time to share your thoughts on the Pace Breaker Short 7" *Linerless. We hear where you're coming from and I'm sorry to hear your item hasn't held up for you as expected. We're eager to work out a resolution, so I'm sending you an email to chat more. Chat soon!

reviews.title: Short shorts
reviews.reviewText: These shorts have a nice feel to them but are exceptionally short.

reviews.title: Incorrect sewing on one side
reviews.reviewText: I love the design and fabric. However, one of the pockets seems to be sewn incorrectly and creates a crease across the shorts because of the imperfection... disappointed in that.

luluResponse.responseText:
Hi Simon Hurley,

Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback with us. I am sorry to hear that your Pace Breaker Short 7" is not performing as you hoped. Keep an eye out for an email coming your way. Chat soon!

reviews.title: What's happening?
reviews.reviewText: Shorts are already starting to fray, had to use a lighter to save the strings from pulling all the way out. Not really the quality I've encountered from lulu

luluResponse.responseText:
Hi Kinda upset,
 
Thanks for taking the time to share your thoughts on Pace Breaker Short 7" *Linerless. I’m sorry to read of your recent experience and would love to hear more about what is going on.
 
Hang tight for an email coming your way! Chat soon.

reviews.title: Too small
reviews.reviewText: I bought these for my boyfriend for Valentine’s Day. He had the same pair that he has had and loved. I bought the same size and they do not fit at all and sadly can’t return them. They must have changed the style of them since the last time we bought a pair last summer.

luluResponse.responseText:
Dear Clarey,

Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback with us. I’m sorry to read of your recent experience and would love to hear more about what is going on with your Pace Breaker Short 7". Hang tight for an email coming your way! Chat soon.

reviews.title: Powerlifter
reviews.reviewText: I felt mislead by the color “Sequoia”. The color shorts I received looked VERY different from the one that I had ordered. It’s sad because the product itself is excellent and I would love to wear these shorts.... but I detest the color! Wish I could trade them out for a different shade, more like the one I thought I had ordered.

reviews.title: Odd fit
reviews.reviewText: These shorts fit my waist well, but are restrictive in the glute and thigh regions. They look roomier in the product pictures. Wish these weren't "final sale"

luluResponse.responseText:
Dear Brandleton,

Thanks for taking the time to write a review! We've passed along the feedback to our Design Team. We pride ourselves on creating long lasting garments that have great fit and function. Your feedback is greatly valued!

reviews.title: Hole
reviews.reviewText: Excellent shorts great look, great feel, will probably buy again, except for getting a hole in them in the first 24 hours of getting them.

luluResponse.responseText:
Hey GolfBoy,

Thanks for reaching out and providing this feedback for us. I'm sorry to hear you're experiencing a hole with your Pace Breaker Short Linerless 7". We'd love to learn more and make things right for you, so keep an eye out for an email coming your way.

reviews.title: Pace Breaker Short *Linerless 7”
reviews.reviewText: I am so disappointed because online the picture show the logo shows very clear. However, when I got them in person, the logo doesn’t stand out. It was very misleading and I am so upset.

luluResponse.responseText:
Dear Tisung,

Thank you for taking the time to review the Pace Breaker Short *Linerless 7". We want you to know, feedback is at the heart of everything we do and we'd love to make this experience right for you.To carry on this conversation, we've sent you a follow up email. Chat soon!

reviews.title: Decent
reviews.reviewText: bought these and bearbottom shorts at the same time. bearbottoms were way better especially at 5.5" inseam. The material of these seem solid and durable, so it's better than other active wear shorts that i've bought.

reviews.title: Pockets Stick Out
reviews.reviewText: I started getting Pace Breaker shorts instead of T.H.E. Short because the new design of T.H.E. Short always has the pockets sticking out/billowed out when worn. For some reason the watermelon red color of pace breakers does this too sadly. I recently got Pace Breakers in the Kaleidoscope colorway and the pockets don't billow as much. The Kaleidoscope pair also feels softer and silkier. I don't know why this is. Maybe materials change between color choices but that doesn't explain why the pockets billow more on the watermelon red color. It sucks because I like these a lot otherwise.

reviews.title: Baggy Shorts. Comfortable Fabric
reviews.reviewText: I will say that these are very comfortable and stretchy shorts. But there is no taper in the leg whatsoever so if you are skinny like I am they look very ill-fitted and loose around the leg openings. I would describe it as a lazily styled product. I would wear these for activities like running / sports where you need full range of motion in the legs, but I originally bought these to be gym shorts and don't think I will wear them because of how baggy they look.

reviews.title: Avg shorts
reviews.reviewText: Love the lite ness of the shorts but dislike the new design of the pockets, old pacebreaker short pockets where more vertical off tot he side, the cut of the these makes the shorts look funny and you lose stuff out of your pocket more easily

luluResponse.responseText:
Dear Drgym, 

Thanks for taking the time to write a review! We've passed along the feedback to our Design Team. We pride ourselves on creating long lasting garments that have great fit and function. Your feedback is greatly valued!

reviews.title: Where's the logo
reviews.reviewText: I read reviews and everyone said they run big so I got large, they fit more like a medium and are way too small. I have owned a couple of things from Lulu-lemon and had no issues but these shorts did not even have a logo on them, disappointed.

luluResponse.responseText:
Hey dalvin, 

Thanks for reaching out and providing this feedback for us! We stand behind the quality of our product, and we want to ensure that you're in gear that is performing well for you. I hear that this is not the case and would like to work with you to create a resolution. Please keep an eye on your inbox as I'll be reaching out shortly to connect.

reviews.title: Everything good except the pocket
reviews.reviewText: Really good just wish it had the same side pocket as T.H.E. shorts because the zipper pocket on these does not have enough room for my phone.

reviews.title: I was sent the wrong size.
reviews.reviewText: I really like these shorts! And it’s 5 stars, but I ordered them in size M and lulu send me size S. Now I am not able to return them or change because it was final sale.

luluResponse.responseText:
Hi There,

Thanks for taking the time to share your thoughts on Pace Breaker Short 7" *Linerless. I’m sorry to read of your recent experience and would love to hear more about what is going on.

Hang tight for an email coming your way! Chat soon.

reviews.title: Great
reviews.reviewText: Very good, wish they had shorter shorts. Skies out thighs out, right?

reviews.title: Noiiice
reviews.reviewText: BF loves these, especially the fact that they're linerless. He did try to put his phone (galaxy s8 - we're behind lol) into the zip pocket and it doens't fit. So just be mindful of that! It seems to fit in the front pockets though.

reviews.title: Tight waistband
reviews.reviewText: I like these shorts. Only drawback is the waistband stretch felt tighter than my 9" Pace Breaker. I felt it immediately the first time i put them on and then again when nature called. Otherwise the fit is fine and the shirts are great for working out.

reviews.title: Not bad
reviews.reviewText: Not as stiff as other shorts but it is still cool.

reviews.title: Great Alternative to THE short
reviews.reviewText:
Personally, I found myself going back and forth between these Pacebreakers and THE shorts - both have their pros and cons. 

For the Pacebreakers, I love the design of the short and the stitching on the back. I only wish the fit would be a little more tapered like THE short. Otherwise, these shorts are perfect!

reviews.title: Perfect Size XXL
reviews.reviewText: 6”2 241lbs muscular, size 36-38 pants. XXL fits perfect. Love fabric and fit. Very pleased.

reviews.title: Still fav short
reviews.reviewText: Still my overall short to goto but liking the surge lately.

reviews.title: Decent shorts
reviews.reviewText: The shorts are good. I like the length and the pockets which what I was looking for. I’ve noticed with the new designs the shorts are little more of slim fit cut. So for guys that have muscular thighs all the shorts don’t fit like lululemon shorts of the past.

reviews.title: Good Shorts
reviews.reviewText: Great shorts, like the new length, but fit is a little snug compared to the others I own...not sure if its just this color that fits this way??

luluResponse.responseText:
Hello there,

Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback with us. Sorry to hear that the Pace Breaker Short's construction isn't working out for you! Give us a call at our Guest Education Centre (1.877.263.9300) or jump on Live Chat to speak directly with an educator. We look forward to hearing from you soon!

reviews.title: Nice linerless pants
reviews.reviewText: Lulu’s signature fabric fees great. Lightweight and great for most runs. Not sure if worth the price over basic shorts, but I’m happy to pay the premium for the fabric

reviews.title: Super shorts but very roomy
reviews.reviewText: Tough material with great streamlined pockets. Strong waistband and drawstring keep the shorts in place. Great detailing. Only issue is that they're cut so wide that they billow a bit at the leg opening, but if you're tall or have thick thighs that shouldn't be a problem.

reviews.title: My favorite gym short
reviews.reviewText: These are my favorite workout shorts, and I can’t just get enough of them. I first started wearing Lululemon to work out in 2014 and since then have bought at least 3 or 4 pairs of these a year, all of which have stood the test of time. Love my pace breakers!

reviews.title: Great shorts
reviews.reviewText: these are my favorite shorts from lulu I have 5 pair!

reviews.title: P a c e b r e a k e r
reviews.reviewText: Perfect short for any sweaty pursuit!

reviews.title: Great fitting and functional shorts
reviews.reviewText: Avery comfortable and functional short. The pockets help keep AirPods and keys intact.

reviews.title: 1000% LULUlemon remains unmatched
reviews.reviewText: Love the color and the fit. I wish they made more !!

reviews.title: Dynamic Shorts
reviews.reviewText: Awesome shorts for any occasion / activity. These are personal favorite now.

reviews.title: Must Have
reviews.reviewText: Cozy, excellent build! Useful side zipped pocket and inner pockets on front. Wear them everyday

reviews.title: Great shorts!
reviews.reviewText: As always high quality product that is great for working out in or relaxing in. Shorts are breathable like all lululemon products. Well worth the price.

reviews.title: The best
reviews.reviewText: Perfect fit for me and comfortable!. I wear these at the gym and for just walking around…

reviews.title: Great pair
reviews.reviewText: Great color and sizing, perfect length hitting right above the knee

reviews.title: Awesome shorts
reviews.reviewText: Great shorts, highly recommend for comfort and activity.

reviews.title: If I could only wear 1 pair of shorts...
reviews.reviewText: Every man should own a pair of these shorts! Great fit, durable, great for working out or lounging!

reviews.title: Comfortable, great shorts
reviews.reviewText: Great shorts! Got these on sale and they're great for both casual wear and working out

reviews.title: Boujee
reviews.reviewText: Nice and comfy. These in medium 7” is a perfect length for me. I’m 5’9 but long legs and  short torso 30in waist. Would recommend and great flexibility in the gym

reviews.title: Gym shorts
reviews.reviewText: It’s lightweight and great for workouts for running at the gym

reviews.title: Great Shorts
reviews.reviewText: Love them, feels like Im not wearing shorts at all. Went from having zero to four different colors. They are great for running but can also wear them in social settings.

reviews.title: My husband likes Lululemon now bc of these shorts!
reviews.reviewText: I buy these shorts for my husband Who wears them to do weightlifting, cross training and even casually. He loves the fit, breathability and length. Will continue to buy these for him!

reviews.title: The best shorts out there
reviews.reviewText: The pace breaker are super soft, comfy, stretchy and the quality is incredible compared to other brands.  I have a number of pairs both liner less and lined. Lululemon gear maintains shape and color and does not disappoint.

reviews.title: 5 out of 5 recommend
reviews.reviewText: Amazing shorts. Fits perfectly and are super comfortable to workout in and also stylish.

reviews.title: Pace breaker 7” linerless
reviews.reviewText: Amazing, probably the most comfortable shorts that I have ever owned.

reviews.title: Great fit and fabric.
reviews.reviewText: Really comfortable fit for the pants, had no problems with the waistband. The breathable fabric for the shorts is very good quality and feels great.

reviews.title: I'd buy again!
reviews.reviewText: Fits perfectly and boyfriend says they're "super comfortable"!

reviews.title: Great shorts !
reviews.reviewText: Very comfy - perfect for any type of exercise or yoga.

reviews.title: Thick, quality material
reviews.reviewText: Great shirts! Thick material. My husband wears them almost daily!

reviews.title: Best short shorts ever
reviews.reviewText: Best short shorts ever, ideal for gym, leg day, running and yoga. Very comfortable but also very durable. I would love to have all lululemon shorts made with the same thick fabric.

reviews.title: Comfy and stylish
reviews.reviewText: Comfy and stylish. Flattering. Got many complimenta

reviews.title: Retro
reviews.reviewText: I LOVE them, my girlfriend said that they make me look like a dad going to Disneyland in the 90s, which made me love them even more!

reviews.title: Durable shorts and they look great.
reviews.reviewText: Great shorts. Incredibly durable for barbell workouts without getting any snags or holes. I love these shorts.

reviews.title: Husband loves these
reviews.reviewText: My husband loves these shorts so I know he’ll be happy to receive another pair for Christmas

reviews.title: Buy extra you’ll love them.
reviews.reviewText: The most comfortable shorts. We have several pairs. They wash and dry and look like new right out of the dryer.

reviews.title: A must have!
reviews.reviewText: Pace breaker is the style I have lots of shorts in. The game day red and blue are the perfect addition. They are very unique, and a must have in every wardrobe.

reviews.title: Pace Breaker Short 7” linerless
reviews.reviewText: Awesome shorts. Unique lululemon pattern and classic, signature accents. Using for HIIT workouts and they’re spot on!

reviews.title: Awesome shorts!
reviews.reviewText: I bought these shorts for my boyfriend. He wears them for working out and really likes them (look/feel/comfort). He and I would definitely buy them again.

reviews.title: Size up for bigger thighs.
reviews.reviewText: I’m 260lbs with 30 inch thighs and  able to wear the bowline shorts in an XL, but these are a little tight in the thighs. I’d advise to go up a size if you’re of a similar build. Otherwise, these are the best shorts outs there. The material is fantastic and insanely comfortable.

reviews.title: Great shorts
reviews.reviewText: Love them and love that they were on sale. These are super comfortable too!

reviews.title: Great Short
reviews.reviewText: These shorts are great for working out. They're lightweight and allow for movement.  Great selection of colors too.

reviews.title: Great shorts
reviews.reviewText: Great shorts as usual - very light weight and great fabric.

reviews.title: Solid
reviews.reviewText: Great pair of shorts! I'm definitely a fan of this style! If they were a little shorter they'd be perfect!

reviews.title: Shirts
reviews.reviewText: Love the wear and sizing on this style. Fit well and look nice

reviews.title: Love these!
reviews.reviewText: Great shorts. Good fit. Hubby wears them all day every day and can’t get enough.

reviews.title: Great fit
reviews.reviewText: My son loves these shorts. Perfect fit, perfect length....by far his favorite shorts from lulu. True to size.

reviews.title: Great shorts
reviews.reviewText: My boyfriend always loves this style. Great length, waistband and print options

reviews.title: Perfect Pocket
reviews.reviewText: Zipper pocket is perfect size for a phone. I need more of these

reviews.title: Shorts
reviews.reviewText: Great shorts, beyond comfortable, fit true to size so if you wear an XL like I do then get an XL.

reviews.title: Good product
reviews.reviewText: I like the fit of these.  I have huge legs, and they are loose enough in the thigh and through the seat to be comfortable without being baggy at all.  The hidden pocket is a nice touch.  The fabric looks good.  They are my go-to shorts for Peloton classes.

reviews.title: Pace Breaker Shorts
reviews.reviewText: It literally feels soooo comfy... not only is it super comfortably wearable in the gym, but it’s also something you can literally wear to bed as well. Feels sooo good against the skin! I have big thighs and these shorts feel amazing!!

reviews.title: The best shorts all around
reviews.reviewText: These shorts are perfect, I love the material and they are perfect for working out or just everyday life

reviews.title: Best gym shorts
reviews.reviewText: Perfect fit, super comfortable. I wear these to the gym every day

reviews.title: Awesome shorts
reviews.reviewText: Great shorts, first pair of Lululemons I've owned and I can't go back to other gym shorts

reviews.title: Pace breaker shorts
reviews.reviewText: Very comfortable good to workout in and very roomy, fits true to size

reviews.title: Nice gym shorts
reviews.reviewText: I inadvertently purchased these thinking they had a liner. I’m happy to report I like them just as much. They are extremely comfortable and fit very well.

reviews.title: Awesome shorts
reviews.reviewText: Perfect for an active lifestyle

reviews.title: My new favorites
reviews.reviewText: These are my new favorite shorts. They are the perfect length, lightweight, and fit just right. The best thing I can say about them is I never think about them when I have them on.

reviews.title: Great for training
reviews.reviewText:
Excellent lightweight yet supportive material. Stretches as needed for athletic movement. 

Length of shorts is spot on

reviews.title: Great
reviews.reviewText: Great purchase as always. Fit is what I like, and style is always A plus.

reviews.title: Great shorts for working out
reviews.reviewText: These shorts are lightweight, comfortable, and flexible. Whether lifting weights, doing cardio, or a class, they are the perfect style and length.

reviews.title: Great shorts
reviews.reviewText: I am a weightlifter these shorts stretch and flex perfectly for deep squat and explosive movement. As a shorter athlete with thick legs, I have never had short that fit me right; they are either too long or baggy, expect for the Pace Breaker and the THE Shorts. Lulu is my go to place for my short needs.

reviews.title: Great shorts
reviews.reviewText: I usually buy the pacebreaker 7” liner shorts but found these on sale. I have to say these are also great shorts. Plenty of room in the thighs and butt will also giving a fitted/athletic look.

reviews.title: Fantastic shorts
reviews.reviewText: Fit well, color hasn’t faded, doesn't attract lint. Love these shorts!

reviews.title: Great workout and general wear shorts!
reviews.reviewText: Perfect fit and great for squats or to wear around town.

reviews.title: Love these!
reviews.reviewText: I am a 30 by 30 and these fit great. I feel lulu shorts run bigger so a small is perfect if you’re around 5’8 and 150-160 lbs. They’re extremely comfortable and the perfect fit. They’re slightly above the knee, which is what I wanted, but not too short like running shorts. Perfect for gym work outs or causal wear.

reviews.title: What can't I do in them?
reviews.reviewText: Anything that involves you moving your legs you need these shorts. I find them to be super comfy, non-restrictive, and a classy look. Whether I'm running, playing soccer, working out in the gym, hiking, climbing... whatever these shorts are the best.

reviews.title: Best all around workout shorts
reviews.reviewText: Super lightweight, thin, and comfortable. Material is very soft yet durable. I bought one in almost every color.

reviews.title: Comfortable and practical
reviews.reviewText: Comfortable fabric, shorts feel light. Color is very cool, easy to coordinate and looks good in the gym. Not as roomy as same style but different fabrics. I enjoy them and will be wear all the time.

reviews.title: Very comfortable shorts
reviews.reviewText: I wear it for outdoor activities. They are very comfortable. Lots of small pockets which are great for carrying different things.

reviews.title: Comfortable and sporty
reviews.reviewText: I've now got multiple pairs of 7" Pacebreaker shorts I use for the gym and outdoors. They're not only attractive and comfortable but also practical with features like pockets with fitted inner sleeves for your phone and a zippered pocket for valuables, keys etc.

reviews.title: Simply Amazing
reviews.reviewText: I bought these shorts for running and they are just great. The fabric is light but it is durable. The zipper pocket is great for keys and the 7' length is perfect for those who want a pair of shorts to run in that are not boxer length but also don't fit like a pair of basketball shorts. I will definitely be buying more of these shorts in other colors.

reviews.title: Favorite shorts
reviews.reviewText: 7” is the perfect length.

reviews.title: Most Comfy Shorts
reviews.reviewText: best feeling shorts ever, love them.

reviews.title: Great shorts
reviews.reviewText: These shorts are great! I’ve been a big fan on lulu shorts for quite some time and they bar far have the best shorts and pants I’ve purchased thus far. These shorts are the perfect length, I just wish the pockets were stitched to the shorts so my stuff didnt flip around so much

reviews.title: Not life changing short
reviews.reviewText: Quality construction with great fabric. It is as if I am wearing nothing at all.

reviews.title: Wow
reviews.reviewText: Just wow

reviews.title: Amazing Shorts
reviews.reviewText: I spent a lot of time debating whether or not I should buy the shorts, due to the price. However, I quickly realized why they are so popular. I absolutely love these shorts and plan on buying more colors in the future. Would definitely recommend these to anyone, whether they be for exercise or just hanging out.

reviews.title: Perfect for running
reviews.reviewText: I'm 5' 6" with 29" waist. Small size fits perfectly. I've been running in Seattle rain for few times already. Fabric seems water repellent and dries very quick. 7" inseam might be a bit short for casual but perfects for running.

reviews.title: Best Running Shorts
reviews.reviewText: These shorts are so nice for running and overall training because oh how lightweight they are.

reviews.title: Best Running Shorts
reviews.reviewText: After trying different shorts for many years finally found the most comfortable shorts. Super comfortable. Initially bought two but was so impressed went ahead and bought 2 more. The search ends here

reviews.title: Half Marathon
reviews.reviewText: I bought these while training for my first half marathon and after wearing them once I knew they’d be what I wore on race day. They’re roomy without looking bulky and I can’t remember a single time they have ever bunched up.

reviews.title: Great Shorts
reviews.reviewText: Great fit and great quality - would recommend these to anyone.

reviews.title: Love No Liner!
reviews.reviewText: a bit shorter than expected. I am 5 11

reviews.title: Awesome Shorts
reviews.reviewText: Bought these for my 18 year old athletic son. He wore them twice within 5 days of receiving them. He says they are very comfortable and not too short and not too long. Good color too. Dark but not black.

reviews.title: Loved them so much I got two.
reviews.reviewText: I originally got these shorts in black and ended up loving them so much I got another pair. I'm training for my first trail marathon and they're my favorite shorts to run both short and long distances in. The fit and material are awesome but best of all, for trail running at least, are the pockets. The interior pockets keep my phone secure and right against my leg to the point I almost forget its there; the zippered pocket keeps gels or electrolyte pills locked in place while bouncing up and down a trail.

reviews.title: Better than the rest
reviews.reviewText: Been on a quest for the best all around short, and I think these maybe them. Super light, place for my phone, head phone hole (not sure of the technical term for that) look good. Go right from yoga to a run to weights without skipping a beat. Barely notice they are on. I have short legs, the 7" hits about 2" above the knee. Awesome. Also have in the 9" either or works for me.

reviews.title: Best Short Ever
reviews.reviewText: Although I own a few pairs of Lululemon shorts already, these shorts are by far my favorite. Comfortable and sturdy, would highly recommend!

reviews.title: Best Shorts Ever!
reviews.reviewText: Everything you have wanted in a pair of shorts finally exists. Pockets, zippers, utility and comfort. Completely amazing.

reviews.title: Great color
reviews.reviewText: Great shorts and awesome color. I love the pockets!!!

reviews.title: Great shorts
reviews.reviewText: Love these shorts. They are very lightweight and have great stretch. They also dry quickly and overall are very comfortable work out in for cardio training, pilates, and weight training. The pockets are also great and make it easy to store cards and my phone.

reviews.title: Gift
reviews.reviewText: I got this as a gift for a friend and he LOVES THEM! "These are my new favorite shorts!!"

reviews.title: High Quality
reviews.reviewText: Great fit and they look fantastic. Great quality like everything lululemon so that’s not too surprising.

reviews.title: Best Fit
reviews.reviewText: I have of a pair of the T.H.E. shorts in 7", but I like these more. The fit is prefect, they move as you do, and the waistband is a bit ore forgiving that other designs Lululemon has.

reviews.title: Perfect short
reviews.reviewText: Great fit and sizing. Good for weekend warriors, crossfitters, and runners alike.

reviews.title: Amazing Short
reviews.reviewText: My husband was hesitant at first, he now has 4 pairs and wants more! Length it perfect, material is nice. A+++

reviews.title: Runner shorts!
reviews.reviewText: Bought these for my high schooler cross country runner. They fit perfectly and are just the right length for a long run.

reviews.title: Great product
reviews.reviewText: Very well built and great quality. I’m usually a large in other brands, but I’m wearing M on this ones. They are a a bit loose for my taste, but a smaller size should do the trick

reviews.title: Great fit
reviews.reviewText: The shorts are what got me to be a Lululemon shopper. They fit great, and the material is condusive to hot yoga which I practice regularly. I usually buy the shorts with liners inside, but these are just as good with a pair of athletic underwear.

reviews.title: Best boyfriend present
reviews.reviewText: Got these for my boyfriend and he loved them! The fit is perfect and the pockets are convenient for when training. Will buy again!
